title: Christopher Golda and Grey Baker Join YC as General Partners
summary: We're excited to announce that Christopher Golda and Grey Baker are joining YC as General Partners.
author: Y Combinator

title: Diana Hu Is YC's Newest Managing Partner
summary: We're thrilled to announce that Diana Hu has been promoted to Managing Partner at Y Combinator. Few people have built a startup from zero and also shipped tech to 100 million people. Diana has done both.
author: Y Combinator

title: Adding Canada Back to Our List of Accepted Countries of Incorporation
summary: After hearing feedback from Canadian founders in our network, we are adding Canada back to our list of accepted countries of incorporation.
author: Y Combinator

title: Congratulations to EquipmentShare on Going Public
summary: Today, EquipmentShare (YC W15) goes public. From Missouri to 373 locations nationwide, they've built the operating system construction has been missing—built by contractors, for contractors. Congrats to Jabbok, Willy, and the EquipmentShare team on a huge milestone.
author: Y Combinator

title: 2026 Demo Day Dates
summary: We’re excited to share the Demo Day dates for 2026 so founders, investors, and our broader community can plan ahead.
author: Y Combinator

title: Meesho Goes Public
summary: Meesho goes public today. From S16 to IPO, they’ve built one of India’s largest e-commerce platforms—empowering millions of small merchants to grow their businesses. Congrats to Vidit and Sanjeev on a decade of relentless building and listening to users!
author: Y Combinator

title: Congratulations to Groww
summary: Today, Groww, India's leading digital investing platform, goes public. Tens of millions use Groww to invest simply and confidently in stocks, mutual funds, and ETFs. As YC's first company to list in India, we couldn't be more proud.
author: Y Combinator

title: BillionToOne Goes Public — The Startup That Made Genetic Testing Universal
summary: Today, BillionToOne goes public, becoming YC's fourth publicly traded biotech company. More importantly, they have built one of the most important genetic tests in the U.S. Today, 1 in 11 babies born in the US are tested with BillionToOne's fetal genetic test.
author: Y Combinator

title: Meet YC's Newest Visiting Partners
summary: We're excited to announce that nine exceptional founders are joining us as Visiting Partners at YC: Matt Riley, Harshita Arora, Grey Baker, Christopher Golda, Raphael Schaad, Christina Gilbert, Francois Chaubard, Vivian Shen, and James Evans.
author: Y Combinator

title: Ankit Gupta Joins YC as General Partner, Bringing Deep ML Expertise

author: Y Combinator

title: Dalton Caldwell’s Move to Partner Emeritus
